title: leads — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. LeadConverted is the load-bearing signal — feeds sports::registrations, marketing (as signup), reporting, and notifications simultaneously. LeadCaptured triggers attribution snapshotting via SnapshotAttributionOnLeadCapture. LeadReassigned + LeadLost provide the audit trail for pipeline retros.

events.name: LeadCaptured
events.trigger: LeadObserver.creating committed a new leads row. Precedes attribution snapshot materialisation.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — regulator lookback on marketing conversions)

payload.source: string (web_form / referral / walk_in / call / email / social / trial_signup / import / api)

events.name: LeadContacted
events.trigger: Lead.stage transitions NEW -> CONTACTED. LeadObserver.updating fires when the stage_change validator accepts the transition.

events.name: LeadTrialBooked
events.trigger: Lead.stage transitions QUALIFIED -> TRIAL. Typically fired when the family accepts a trial-session invitation.

payload.trial_scheduled_at: ISO 8601 | null (from the trial_scheduled activity when known)

events.name: LeadConverted
events.trigger: CRITICAL. Lead.stage transitions to WON. LeadConversionService materialised athletes into sports::registrations + attribution snapshot travels to marketing::MarketingEvent event_type=signup.
consumers: leads::MaterialiseAthletesOnLeadConverted (creates athlete + guardian rows via sports::registrations)
marketing::MarketingEventCapturer (maps to marketing_events.event_type='signup' for ad-network fan-out)

payload.attribution_snapshot: object (frozen at capture — passed through to downstream consumers)

events.name: LeadLost
events.trigger: Lead.stage transitions to LOST. lost_reason set at the same time. Terminal.
consumers: monitoring::MetricsCollector (increments stackra.leads.lost_total; feeds loss-reason breakdown dashboard)

events.name: LeadReassigned
events.trigger: Lead.owner_id changed OR the leads:reassign-stale command flushed stale-lead reassignment. Every fire writes an assignment activity via the observer.

payload.actor_id: ULID | null (null = system-generated by the stale-reassignment job)
